turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I want to push my appointment. Got stuck with something at home, can't make it tomorrow.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No problem at all. Could I have your name and the appointment details?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Omkar Kulkarni. It was tomorrow at 11 AM with the GP.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, I see it — Omkar Kulkarni, 11 AM tomorrow with Dr. Ramesh Iyer. When would you like to reschedule?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, can I do this Friday? Any time in the afternoon?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Friday afternoon has 2 PM and 4:30 PM available with Dr. Iyer. Which do you prefer?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Rescheduled to Friday at 4:30 PM. You'll get an updated SMS. Anything else?
